top_signals.title: Copper Rises as Traders Track Peace Talks and Pull of US Premium
top_signals.summary: Copper advanced as traders assessed the prospect of a Middle East peace deal and the pull of a premium for the metal in the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Scientists Forecast Below-Normal Atlantic Hurricane Season
top_signals.summary: U.S. government scientists said on Thursday they expect a below-normal Atlantic tropical storm season in 2026, likely producing one to three major hurricanes with sustained winds of at least 111 miles per hour (179 kph).Officials from the National…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hackers steal patient and billing data from German hospitals via third-party provider
top_signals.summary: The large-scale data breach reportedly hit Unimed, a company that handles billing services for privately insured and self-paying patients on behalf of numerous German hospitals.
